articles.description: Olandria Carthen and Nic Vansteenberghe, who were paired together after a major twist on "Love Island USA" in 2025, have ended their relationship.

articles.description: Melanie Shatner Gretsch reveals how a late-night lump led to her HER2-positive breast cancer diagnosis while her father faced Stage 4 melanoma.

articles.title: Michael J. Fox: Getting Back to Acting "Really Prolonged My Life" - The Hollywood Reporter
articles.description: Thirty-five years after his diagnosis, the Hollywood icon and his foundation are fighting harder than ever to find a cure for Parkinson’s. But with a return to 'Shrinking' confirmed, he’s not giving up his day job anytime soon.

articles.title: Colson Whitehead Talks About Embracing Change, Pulling Off A Heist, And Finding A Good Coffee Table - Defector
articles.description: “The city was question and answer in one,” Colson Whitehead writes early on in Cool Machine, the final novel of his Harlem Trilogy. “Cause and effect and everything else, too.” You can forgive the lifelong New Yorker for being a little romantic about his home…

articles.title: On ‘Little Miss Twain,’ Shania Twain reflects on her humble beginnings and her late mother - AP News
articles.description: Shania Twain's new album, “Little Miss Twain,” explores her early life in Northern Ontario, Canada, a chapter she says most of her fans don't know much about. She recalls singing to rugged crowds of miners and hunters in small town bars. The album, out Friday…
